description: Auto-responses for keyword-matched partner replies. Matched by campaign. No LLM cost. See _config/response_playbook/keyword_replies.md for the response framework.
_note: Schema: `simple_reply_patterns` catches START/affirmative intents; `help_patterns` catches HELP intents. Each campaign's `response` is the START-intent reply; `help_response` is the HELP-intent reply. Consumers: server/services/sync_service.py, dashboard.py, scripts/salesmsg_sync.py. HELP wiring pending — consumer code currently only reads `simple_reply_patterns` and `response`.
simple_reply_patterns: ^\s*(yes|yeah|yea|yep|yup|ya|sure|ok|okay|k|bet|lets go|let's go|start|ready|i'm ready|im ready|do it|sign me up|how|how do i|what do i do|send them|send it|interested|i'm interested|im interested|absolutely|for sure|down|i'm down|im down|please|yes please|ok thanks|okay thanks|START)\s*[!.?👍🙏💪]*\s*$
help_patterns: ^\s*(help|help me|i need help|i'm stuck|im stuck|stuck|i'm lost|im lost|lost|confused|\?+|HELP|Help)\s*[!.?]*\s*$

_default.response: Open the Shiftsmart app and on the Home tab look for the "Earn $10 today, unlock shifts" section. Tap "Start earning" on the "Unlock nearby shifts" card to begin the In-App Orientation — takes about 30 minutes on your phone and your progress is saved so you can pause and come back. You'll earn $10 when you finish all the steps.
_default.help_response: Happy to walk you through it. Open the Shiftsmart app, go to the Home tab, and look for the "Earn $10 today, unlock shifts" section — tap "Start earning" on the "Unlock nearby shifts" card. Takes about 30 min on your phone and you'll earn $10 at the end. Any questions?

4.6.26 - OP_no_BGC_Pilot.response: To pick up Circle K shifts, go to the Shifts tab in the Shiftsmart app and find a shift that works for your schedule. When you find one you like, tap the "Book Shift" button to sign up for it! You can pick up shifts while your background check is being reviewed. Let me know if you have any questions.
4.6.26 - OP_no_BGC_Pilot.help_response: Happy to help — to browse shifts, open the Shifts tab in the Shiftsmart app. You can filter by date, pay, and distance. Tap a shift you like and then "Book Shift" to pick it up. What questions can I answer?
